fact: 30 million people in China live in caves.
In 1986, there was a program in China to relocate cave-dwelling people into better caves rather than houses.
15,000 people stayed in caves in Kent in England during the Second World War.
There were rules in the caves in Kent enforcing quiet hours and bedtimes.
The President of China, Xi Jinping, lived in a cave for seven years during the Cultural Revolution.
